summary: Tested platform-managed billing + credits system for Emanator. All 8 backend API tests PASSED. Frontend UI verified: credits display in TopBar (59.50), Buy Credits button, Credits modal with balance/costs/packages. Code review confirms model cost labels implemented in ModelSelector.jsx with data-testid attributes.

features_tested.feature: GET /api/credits returns balance, costs, packages, modelCosts
POST /api/credits/use deducts credits and returns new balance
POST /api/credits/add adds credits and returns new balance
modelCosts contains correct cost tiers for all models
Supabase login works with test credentials
Login flow works (email/password via Enter key)
Credits display visible in TopBar showing balance (59.50)
Buy Credits button visible in TopBar
Credits modal opens with balance, cost per action table, purchase options

model_cost_labels.details: MODEL_COST_TIERS with credits/tier/label for each model, COST_COLORS for tier coloring, cost labels rendered with data-testid='model-cost-{model-id}' showing '{credits} cr' format

stream_handler_credit_precheck.details: Lines 93-119: Credit pre-check before provider call, emits credits_exhausted SSE event with upsell message when balance < estimated cost

stream_client_callbacks.details: onCreditsExhausted, onCreditsUpdate, onFallbackNotice callbacks added at lines 91-93

fallback_map.details: FALLBACK_MAP populated at line 69 with gpt-4o→gpt-4o-mini, claude-sonnet→gpt-4o, etc.

error_classification.details: 'budget' keyword added to billing classifier at line 62, unknown errors translated to product language at line 144

dashboard_credit_handlers.details: onCreditsExhausted, onCreditsUpdate, onFallbackNotice handlers at lines 1410-1421 and 1535-1546

critical_code_review_comments: All credit system features are correctly implemented
Model cost labels in ModelSelector.jsx show credits with tier-based coloring
Stream-handler credit pre-check prevents generation when credits are insufficient
SSE events (credits_exhausted, credits_update, fallback_notice) properly emitted and handled
FALLBACK_MAP correctly maps premium models to fallback options
Error classification translates provider errors to user-friendly product language
context_for_next_testing_agent: Credits system fully tested. Key findings: (1) GET /api/credits returns balance, costs, packages, and modelCosts. (2) POST /api/credits/use deducts credits correctly. (3) POST /api/credits/add increases balance. (4) Credits display shows in TopBar with Buy Credits button. (5) Credits modal shows balance, cost per action, and purchase options. (6) Model cost labels implemented in ModelSelector.jsx with data-testid attributes. (7) Stream-handler has credit pre-check that emits credits_exhausted SSE event. (8) FALLBACK_MAP and error classification properly implemented. Note: Model selector with cost labels is inside project conversation view (ChatComposer) - couldn't navigate to project view in UI test but code review confirms implementation.
